org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport

接口 ChannelHandlerDelegate

  • 所有超级接口:
    ChannelHandler
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractChannelHandlerDelegate, AllChannelHandler, AllChannelHandler2, ConnectionOrderedChannelHandler, DecodeHandler, DirectChannelHandler, ExecutionChannelHandler, HeaderExchangeHandler, HeartbeatHandler, MessageOnlyChannelHandler, MultiMessageHandler, WrappedChannelHandler

    public interface ChannelHandlerDelegate
extends ChannelHandler

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
